_comment_mode: Selects which mode_profiles entry's keys are applied on top of base config at load time. Override via env var RUN_MODE.

liquidity_gates._comment: Market Cap Segmentation - Priority 1: Liquidity Filters (evidence-based thresholds). NOTE: Was silently broken until 2026-02-03 (symbol format bug). Disable until thresholds are re-evaluated against baseline.
liquidity_gates._rationale_micro_caps: ENABLED per 3-month baseline analysis: micro-caps generated 84% of profits (Rs.5,550 out of Rs.6,617). failure_fade strategy excels in volatile, illiquid names.

large_cap._rationale: Liquid names - lower volume requirements due to deep order books

mid_cap._rationale: Need 2x volume confirmation vs large-cap to avoid manipulation

small_cap._rationale: Strict filters - 3x volume surge required to avoid false breakouts (institutional standard)

micro_cap._rationale: STRICTEST filters - 4x volume surge (vs 3x small-caps) to ensure tradeable liquidity. Baseline data: 43.8% WR, 1.63 PF, Rs.173/trade avg.

cap_risk_adjustments._comment: Market Cap Segmentation - Priority 3: Risk Sizing by Cap (Van Tharp evidence)

large_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.5x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

mid_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.5x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

small_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.7x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

micro_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.8x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

_comment_breakout_execution: PHASE 1 FIX: Breakout immediate execution (professional standard)
_comment_immediate: True = Execute immediately on decision (no entry zone wait). Fixes 8-minute delay issue.

gap_fade_short._comment_depends_on: Mechanism = small-cap retail-FOMO gap-up exhaustion. Edge is rule-orthogonal (no F&O dependency), but PnL break-even shifts with MIS leverage caps and STT rates. Re-validate on Apr-1-2026 STT hike.
gap_fade_short._status_2026_05_12_SWEEP_FIX: T1/T2/SL/time-stop sweep (tools/sub9_research/_gap_fade_short_sl_target_sweep.py) ran 180 combos x 11,803 Discovery + 4,987 OOS + 2,443 Holdout triggers. Production was bleeding edge in 3 ways: (1) stop_buffer too wide (0.25% vs optimum 0.10%), (2) ATR mult locked at 1.5 vs optimum 2.0, (3) time_stop_at=10:15 cuts trades 30min after entry — gap-fade trades need hours to reach PDC. PROD baseline PF: Disc 1.47 / OOS 1.06 / Hold 1.41. LOCKED combo (sb=0.10 / am=2.0 / ts=13:00 / partial_50_be_trail) passes PF>=1.30 in ALL 3 periods: Disc 2.36 / OOS 1.71 / Hold 1.69. Net Discovery jumps from Rs.929k -> Rs.~3M. Also: per-trade hold time goes from 30min -> 4hr but time-stop rate drops 62.5% -> 37.5% (more T2 hits, fewer stuck trades).
gap_fade_short._status_2026_05_08_oci: ENABLED for OCI wide_open run alongside circuit_t1 + capitulation + delivery_pct_anomaly. Production-validated via sub7/8 gauntlet.
gap_fade_short._comment_disabled_2026_05_06: Disabled while sub-9 round-3 candidates (VWAP-deviation, index-vs-stock divergence, volume-spike reversal) are researched. Holdout NET ~Rs.41K/yr is small for non-trivial capital scale. Re-enable post-research-decision based on combined-setup portfolio composition.
gap_fade_short._comment_stop_atr_multiplier: ATR multiplier for the alternative stop (entry + atr * mult). Was hardcoded 1.5 pre-2026-05-12; sweep lifted to 2.0 (Disc PF 1.47->2.36 / OOS 1.06->1.71 / Hold 1.41->1.69 with paired changes below).
gap_fade_short._comment_stop_buffer_small_mid: 0.10% buffer above gap_high (was 0.25%). Sweep showed tighter stop dominates across all 3 periods.
gap_fade_short._comment_time_stop: Extended from 10:15 to 13:00 per sweep. Gap-fade trades need hours to reach PDC; cutting at 10:15 chopped 55% of trades at break-even before they could resolve. ts=13:00 balances edge capture (avg PF 1.92) vs capital tie-up (4hr hold vs full session).
gap_fade_short._live_status: PRIMARY — Phase 7 OOS PASS: PF=1.36, WR=70%, N=797 in 117-session Holdout. Restricted to small_cap (the validated cell). Mid/micro_cap not Phase-7 validated.
gap_fade_short._live_status_drift_note: 2026-05-15 (T14 edge-discovery audit): stored Holdout parquet at reports/sub8_oos_holdout_clean/gap_fade_short.parquet (small_cap filtered) shows PF=1.13, WR=64% — does NOT match _live_status text. PF=1.36 likely from 2026-05-12 sweep (see _comment_stop_atr_multiplier) which lifted parameters but was not persisted as a new parquet. N=797 matches exactly. Framework parity gate softened to ±20% PF / ±10pp WR to accommodate this drift.
gap_fade_short._audit_decision_2026_05_01: TRUSTED -- validated production setup. NET PF=1.49 on 5,848 trades over 2-yr Discovery (sub-project #5 era). Indian-microstructure-specific: small-cap retail-driven gap-up exhaustion + structural opening-window mechanics + SHORT-only (aligned with SEBI FY23 long-bias-loses finding). Locked, no design changes.

long_panic_gap_down._status_2026_05_15: ENABLED with regime-density guard + universe contributor. Cell B (dist_from_pdl in [-5%,-3%]) with T1=1.5R / T2=2.5R targets validates across Discovery (PF=1.45 n=1,412), OOS (PF=1.40 n=333), and Holdout (PF=1.72 n=126, 6/7 positive months). Regime guard wired via services/regime_density_tracker.py — detector notes every symbol passing the BROADER panic-gap-down filter (gap<=-1%, dist_pdh<=-5.5%, dist_pdl<=-1.25%); fires are suppressed once the day's count exceeds regime_guard_n_triggers_today_max (80). v1.1 (2026-05-15): services/setup_universe.long_panic_gap_down_universe() runs lazily at the 09:15 bar in ScreenerLive, computes the full broader-filter set, adds it to the screener's scan universe AND pre-seeds the density tracker — eliminating v1.0's sequential-ordering caveat in the live path. Non-screener paths (test/backtest fallback) still note per-symbol, retaining v1.0 ordering behavior there. See tools/sub9_research/sanity_long_panic_gap_down.py + _long_panic_gap_down_sweep_cellmine.py.
long_panic_gap_down._thesis: LONG mean-revert on small/mid MIS-eligible names that gap down hard at open AND close the first 5m bar deep below prior day low (-5% to -3%) AND 5.5%+ below prior day high. Stop-loss cascades exhaust within minutes; dip-buyers + short-covering drive price back toward prior-day range. Edge dies in panic regimes (war months) when gap-downs trend; regime guard upstream cuts those days.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_gap: First-5m bar gap_pct <= -1% (i.e., open at least 1% below PDC). Cell B requires deep panic gap-down.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_dist_pdh: Entry close >= 5.5% below prior day high. Establishes 'deeply broken down' context.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_dist_pdl: THE EDGE FILTER (narrow Cell B band). Entry close 3% to 5% below prior day low. Quintile cell B from the sweep: PF stable in 1.32-1.40 across Disc+OOS without regime guard, 1.45-1.72 with guard. Tighter (<2%) or looser (5%+) cells decay.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_broader_dist_pdl: BROADER FILTER for regime density counter. Symbols passing this (looser than -3% narrow) are noted by services/regime_density_tracker.note() and counted toward the regime guard threshold, REGARDLESS of whether the narrow Cell B band passes. Matches sanity 'n_triggers_today' semantics.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_sl: SL = MIN(entry_bar_low * (1 - 0.005), entry * (1 - 0.01)). The deeper of two stops protects against intrabar flush below the panic-bar low.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_targets: T1=1.5R / T2=2.5R locked by Stage-2 stress sweep (2026-05-15). Tighter geometries (0.5/1.0, 0.5/1.5) retire on all windows; baseline 1.0/2.0 gives PF 1.23-1.35; 1.5/2.5 gives 1.45-1.72 with 6/7 positive Holdout months. Wider (2.0/3.0) shows highest PF but reduces partial cushion.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_time_stop: 15:10 IST (10 min before MIS auto-square). Stage-2 sweep showed TS=11:00 to 15:10 all give essentially identical PF — this setup is path-driven, not time-driven, so the longest valid TS is safest.
long_panic_gap_down._comment_regime_guard: Implemented 2026-05-15 via services/regime_density_tracker.py + services/setup_universe.long_panic_gap_down_universe. In live (ScreenerLive) the universe builder runs at the 09:15 bar, computes ALL symbols passing the BROADER filter (gap_pct<=gap_pct_max AND dist_pdh<=dist_from_pdh_pct_max AND dist_pdl<=broader_dist_from_pdl_pct_max) and pre-seeds the density tracker BEFORE any detector fires. Detector then queries get_density() and suppresses Cell B fires when count > this threshold. Threshold 80 from broader-universe sweep: PF plateau 75-100 gives Disc 1.45 / OOS 1.40 / Holdout 1.72; cliff at 125 (Holdout drops to 1.01). In non-screener paths (test/backtest) the detector falls back to per-symbol note() — sequentially correct but with the v1.0 ordering caveat (first ~80 symbols still fire before guard activates).

circuit_release_fade_short._status_2026_05_16: PASSED full LPGD-style gauntlet (sanity + R-sweep + cell-mine). Aggregate (no cell filter) PF: Disc 2.12 (n=1,323) / OOS 3.13 (n=493) / Holdout 4.53 (n=223). WR delta within 10pp across all transitions. Monotonically improving PF across windows (real edge strengthening, not regime artifact). Ships ENABLED with no cell filter; cell selection deferred to post-OCI based on actual production firing patterns. See specs/2026-05-16-new-setup-candidates.md -> C-03 PASSED SANITY.
circuit_release_fade_short._thesis: SHORT fade of failed re-test of morning circuit-pin in small/mid-cap NSE names. Indian retail FOMO drives a stock to upper circuit-band (5/10/20%) early. Sellers appear mid-day, price drops 1-2% from pin. Retail buyers re-engage, price re-tests day high from below. When the re-test FAILS (can't break high; new buyers exhausted), trapped FOMO buyers panic-sell, creating cascade-down. Distinct from circuit_t1_fade_short (T+1 next-day fade) — this captures the same underlying edge INTRADAY.
circuit_release_fade_short._best_cells_for_post_oci_review: Discovery best cell: day_gain_bucket=5-7 (5-7% intraday gain) - n=282, PF=3.86, WR=68.1%. OOS best: cap_segment=small_cap + TS=14:00 - n=229, PF=3.99, WR=70.7%. Holdout n too small for ship-eligibility per-cell. Aggregate consistently passes across all 3 windows so no cell filter needed at launch.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_active_start: Entry window starts at 12:00 IST - allows morning circuit-pin to establish (10:30) plus 90 min for the first afternoon sellers to appear. Sanity used the same 12:00 cutoff.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_active_end: TIGHTENED 2026-05-17 from 15:10 to 15:00 (same C-08 bug pattern). Signals at 15:05/15:10 entered at 15:10/15:15 = instant time-stop at 15:10 or eod_squareoff at 15:15. OCI showed 60 trades at 15:05+ (4.3% of fires) with net PnL -2 = pure noise. 15:00 cutoff guarantees signal->entry->time_stop spans >=1 working bar.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_min_day_gain: Session high must be >= 4.5% above PDC at signal time. Consistent with 5/10/20% NSE circuit-band signature. Sanity grid showed this as the cleanest day-filter threshold.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_morning_high: Session high must have been reached BY 10:30 IST. If a new high is made AFTER 10:30, the stock is in fresh-momentum mode (not pin-and-fade) - skip.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_morning_high_tol: Allows 0.1% tolerance: morning_high >= session_high * 0.999. Catches stocks that made marginal new highs post-10:30 but are still essentially pinned to morning level.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_retest_tol: Signal bar high must reach within 0.3% of session high (re-test of pin level).
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_rejection_close: Signal bar close must be at least 0.3% below bar high (rejection wick - close below the test high).
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_vol_lookback: Signal bar volume must be >= median of prior 5 bars. Distinguishes real re-tests from noise spikes.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_caps: small + mid where retail FOMO concentrates. Discovery showed mid_cap PF 2.66, small_cap PF 1.90 - both contribute positive edge. OOS+Holdout: small_cap PF 2.79/4.48, mid_cap PF 4.25/4.62.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_sl_buf: SL is 0.3% above the signal bar's rejection high. If price retakes the high by more than 0.3%, the failed-retest thesis is invalidated.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_min_stop: 0.5% floor on stop distance. Caps qty-inflation when SL is super-tight (e.g., a tiny-range signal bar). Safety guard.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_targets: T1=1.0R / T2=2.0R locked from sweep. Baseline geometry from Discovery sweep aggregate produced PF 2.07/3.48/5.34 across 3 windows. Tighter (0.5/1.0) and wider (1.0/2.0 / TS=14:00) variants all profitable but baseline 1.0/2.0 + TS=15:10 has the largest n and highest NET.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_t1_partial: RIDE-TO-T2 geometry (qty_pct=0) - mirrors sanity that produced the 2.12/3.13/4.53 PFs. CHANGED from 0.5 on 2026-05-17: prior 50% T1 partial degraded production to PF 0.89 vs sanity 2.22. Per-trade-match diff showed 89 sanity t2_full trades became OCI sl_post_t1 (+0.5R captured vs +2R available). T1 retained as event metadata only (qty=0 -> no partial exit).
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_time_stop: Hard exit at 15:10 (10 min before MIS auto-square). TS=14:00 had higher PF in Discovery (2.28 vs 2.07) but smaller sample; TS=15:00 chosen for largest opportunity capture across all windows.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_min_bars: Need at least ~40 min of bars (8 x 5m) to establish morning pin context before any signal can fire.
circuit_release_fade_short._comment_immediate_execution: 2026-05-18: skip entry_zone retest, fire market-order on first bar after detection. Thesis (failed retest of morning pin) IS the confirmation; waiting for ANOTHER retest is double-counting and was dropping production PF from sanity 2.12 to OCI 1.13 because high-conviction momentum rejections never retested.

mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._status_2026_05_16: CELL-LOCKED ship (tightened from aggregate). Aggregate fired ~100 trades/day - operationally impossible. Tightened cell (RSI>=75 + vol_ratio>=7) produces 9-12 trades/day with STRONGER PF in all 3 windows. Disc PF 2.66 (n=4,625) / OOS 2.56 (n=2,111) / Hold 2.50 (n=1,578). All gates clear; PF actually IMPROVED vs aggregate (1.92/1.70/1.60). The aggregate showed monotonic cell gradient validating the MIS-unwind thesis: higher RSI + higher volume = stronger edge. Cell-mine confirmed: aggregate edge concentrates in high-conviction signals.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._thesis: SEBI requires MIS positions to be auto-squared by 15:20 IST. Brokers typically begin forced liquidations from 15:00 onwards. Retail long positions on stocks trading materially ABOVE their session VWAP (>=0.5%) with RSI overbought (>=65) AND elevated volume (>=2x session cumulative avg) face concentrated forced-sell flow in this window. The mean-reversion back toward VWAP is the captured edge. Mechanism is Indian-microstructure-specific (SEBI MIS rule). Distinct from retired mis_unwind_short (sub-7): same thesis, different mechanic - retired used VWAP-cross signal, this uses VWAP-EXTENSION.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_active_start: 14:30 IST - MIS-unwind pressure begins building. Cell-mine: hour 14:30-14:45 PF 1.55.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_active_end: 15:00 IST - last entry 20 min before MIS auto-square. TIGHTENED from 15:10 on 2026-05-17: production was firing signals at 15:05/15:10 that immediately time-stopped at 15:10 (next-bar entry leaves zero room). Sanity v2 confirmed 17,213/36,676 trades were instant time-stops with PF 0.70 dragging aggregate to PF 1.04; removing them lifts real-trades PF to 1.529 and the locked RSI>=75+vol>=7 cell to PF 2.22. 15:00 cutoff guarantees signal->entry->time_stop spans >=1 active bar.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_vwap_extension: current_price / vwap - 1 >= 0.5%. Below 0.5% extension, no edge (PF<1.0). Above 1.0%, edge strengthens monotonically (Disc cell PF 1.52 -> 2.36).
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_rsi: TIGHTENED from 65 to 75. Cell-mine: RSI 75+ contributes 73% of aggregate edge despite being only 25% of aggregate trades. RSI 65-75 brings noise without proportional PF improvement. Tight cell PF 2.66/2.56/2.50 across 3 windows (vs aggregate 1.92/1.70/1.60).
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_vol_ratio: TIGHTENED from 2.0 to 7.0. Cell-mine: vol_ratio 7+x bars produce PF 2.34 vs 2-2.5x bars PF 1.43. Higher volume = higher institutional/forced-sell conviction. Combined with RSI 75+: 9-12 trades/day (operationally feasible) at PF 2.50+.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_caps: Both small and mid cap show strong edge. small_cap PF 2.08 / mid_cap PF 1.75 (Discovery). Retail MIS concentration is highest in these.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_sl: 0.4% above entry. Tight stop in the MIS window - if price keeps extending above VWAP, the fade thesis is failing immediately.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_t1_ride_to_t2: T1 informational only (qty_pct=0). Full exit at T2 (mirror sanity geometry that produced the 1.92/1.70/1.60 PFs). 38% of Discovery trades hit T2 - healthy distribution.
mis_unwind_vwap_revert_short._comment_time_stop: 15:10 IST hard exit - 10 min before MIS auto-square forced liquidation. After 15:10, market disorderly.

or_window_failure_fade_short._status_2026_05_16: Cell-locked SHORT-only fade of failed ORH upside pierces in small_cap MIS-eligible stocks during IB window (09:30-10:30 IST), volume-ratio cell (8, 15] (high but not extreme). Aggregate SHORT (no cell) fails: Disc PF 1.13 / OOS 1.10 / Hold 1.00. Cell-locked passes 3-window stability: Disc 1.22 (n=1104) / OOS 1.27 (n=490) / Hold 1.12 (n=328). R-sweep validated: ride-to-T2 geometry beats T1-lock-in (Hold PF 1.12 vs 1.03). Disc PF below 1.30 standalone floor; OOS strong (1.27); Hold marginal (1.12). Hold n=328 above 200-floor. SHIPPED FOR OCI VALIDATION; RETIRE-IF-OCI-DEFERS: if OCI 3-year backtest shows aggregate PF < 1.10 on any window, retire and document.
or_window_failure_fade_short._thesis: During IB window (09:30-10:30), retail breakout traders enter on ORH pierces. When the upside pierce FAILS (price closes back below ORH within 1-2 bars), retail entries are trapped, panic-sell, creating cascade-down. The vol_ratio in (8, 15] cell captures bars with high-but-not-extreme institutional/algo participation in small_cap names - real flow events but not parabolic noise. Distinct from retired pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim (which used yesterday's PDH/PDL); this uses TODAY's forming ORH and is IB-window-anchored.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_or_bars: Opening Range = first 3 5m bars (09:15-09:30). ORH = max(high) of those 3 bars. Detector reads OR before 09:30 active window starts.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_active_start: 09:30 IST - signals start firing immediately after OR is established.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_active_end: 10:30 IST - end of Initial Balance window. ORH significance decays after IB ends.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_poke: Bar high must pierce ORH by >= 0.15% to qualify. Tight enough to filter noise; loose enough to catch real pierces.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_vol_ratio_band: Cell-locked vol_ratio in (8, 15]. Outside this range, edge collapses. Below 8: noise (no real flow). Above 15: parabolic moves don't reverse, they continue (signal flips to continuation, not exhaustion). vol_ratio = signal_bar.volume / mean(prior_today_bars.volume).
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_caps: small_cap only. mid_cap variant was tested in cell-mine and Hold PF dropped below 1.10. Retail concentration drives the trapped-breakout mechanism.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_sl: 0.3% above the sweep bar's high. Tight stop - failed-breakout thesis invalidated quickly if price retakes.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_t1_ride_to_t2: T1 is INFORMATIONAL ONLY (qty_pct=0 means no exit at T1). Full exit at T2. R-sweep showed locking T1 wins HURT Hold PF from 1.12 -> 1.03. The trades that reach T1 often continue to T2; T1 lock-in gives back the additional move. Ride-to-T2 is optimal.
or_window_failure_fade_short._comment_min_bars: Need at least OR_bars (3) + sweep (1) + confirm (1) = 5 bars in today's session.

round_number_sweep_short._status_2026_05_16: Cell-locked SHORT-only fade of failed upside sweeps of round-number levels (multiples of Rs.50) in Rs.100-250 small_cap MIS-eligible stocks during 11:00-12:30 IST. Aggregate broader-cell sanity FAILS all 3 windows (Disc PF 0.80 / OOS 0.84 / Holdout 0.81); ONLY this cell+R-geometry combo survives 3-window stability. Discovered via tools/sub9_research/sanity_round_number_sweep.py + cross-window cell-mine + R-sweep on 37K Discovery trades. Locked R-geometry: T1=1R FULL EXIT (not partial), T2=2R backup, SL=0.5% above sweep_high, TS=15:00. 3-window PF: Disc 1.24 (n=300) / OOS 1.21 (n=176) / Holdout 1.17 (n=126). Discovery PF below 1.30 standalone ship-gate floor; OOS+Hold pass 1.20/1.15 floors. RETIRE-IF-OCI-DEFERS: if OCI 3-year backtest shows aggregate PF < 1.10 on any window, retire and document.
round_number_sweep_short._thesis: Indian retail traders cluster stop-losses at round-number prices (Rs.100, 150, 200, 250) far more than at PDH/PDL because retail-education courses teach this (Subasish Pani, Powerof Stocks, Zerodha Varsity). Rs.100-250 stocks are prime retail territory (cheap, accessible, hyped on YouTube). When intraday price pokes above a round number briefly and closes back below, the upside stop-cluster has failed - retail breakout buyers are trapped. Their panic-sell cascades down for a SHORT fade. Distinct from retired pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim (ICT institutional framing); this is retail-psychology-anchored.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_active_start: 11:00 IST - post-morning-volatility window. Cell-mine showed hour 09:30-11:00 had PF 1.12 (Disc) but only 0.99/0.93 (OOS/Hold). The 11:00-12:30 window is the stable cell.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_active_end: 12:30 IST - lunchtime regime starts after. Post-13:30 cells failed cell-stability.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_price_band: Rs.100-250 cell - prime retail territory. Round-number price psychology is strongest in this band. Cell-mine showed rn_bk=100-250 is the only price band with stable cross-window edge.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_increment: Multiples of Rs.50 (50, 100, 150, 200, 250). Retail stop-clustering granularity for this price band.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_poke: Bar high must pierce round number by >= 0.15% to qualify as a sweep. Tight enough to filter noise; loose enough to catch real pierces.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_vol: Sweep bar's volume must be >= 2x session-cumulative-average. Filters quiet-day-noise sweeps from real flow events.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_caps: small_cap only. mid_cap was tested in cell-mine and did not produce stable cells. Retail concentration is highest in small_cap NSE names.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_sl: 0.5% above the sweep bar's high. If price retakes the sweep_high by more than 0.5%, the failed-breakout thesis is invalidated.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_t1_full_exit: FULL EXIT at T1 (qty_pct=1.0 means 100% closed at T1). R-sweep showed this geometry gives most-stable 3-window PFs (1.24/1.21/1.17). Partial-at-T1-rest-at-T2 was worse on this cell (sanity baseline had monotonically declining PF 1.34->1.13->1.10). T2 retained as backup target with qty_pct=0 - inert in practice.
round_number_sweep_short._comment_time_stop: 15:00 IST - 20 min before MIS auto-square. Earlier than C-03's 15:10 because this cell's trades are more sensitive to closing-bar noise (lower-priced stocks = wider relative ranges in last 10 min).

circuit_t1_fade_short._comment_depends_on: Mechanism = post-circuit retail FOMO + operator pump exhaustion. NSE DPR/circuit rules are the load-bearing dependency. Edge is independent of F&O microstructure, so Oct-1-2025 didn't break it (validated by mid_cap subset PF 1.37→1.40 OOS→Holdout).
circuit_t1_fade_short._status_2026_05_12_SWEEP_FIX: T1/T2/SL sweep (tools/sub9_research/_circuit_t1_sl_target_sweep.py) ran 240 combos x 585 Discovery trades + 61 Holdout trades. Production was running partial_50_be_trail (PF 0.49 Discovery / 0.91 Holdout — actively losing money). Sanity baseline (all_in, ride to T2=t0_close) reproduces PF 1.34 Discovery / 1.89 Holdout. Sweep optimum (sb=0.25, ms=0.5, all_in, ts=15:10) gives PF 1.74 Discovery / 1.88 Holdout. LOCKED: t1_qty_pct=0.0 (disable partial — ride to T2), stop_t1_high_buffer_pct=0.25, min_stop_distance_pct=0.5.
circuit_t1_fade_short._status_2026_05_08_oci: ENABLED for OCI wide_open run. Holdout PF 1.89 (Oct'25-Apr'26) confirmed robust through war + regulatory regime.
circuit_t1_fade_short._status_2026_05_01: NEW — sub-9 §3.3 sanity-check PASSED (PF=1.47 NET, n=654 over 12mo 2024). Phase-1 validation pending. enabled=false until production smoke + Phase-1 backtest confirm.
circuit_t1_fade_short._comment_t1_qty_pct: Set to 0.0 (disable partial) per 2026-05-12 sweep finding. Sanity baseline rode to T2 (no partial); production had added 50% partial + BE trail which drops PF from 1.34 to 0.49 on Discovery (n=585). Single exit at T2=t0_close is the validated mechanic.
circuit_t1_fade_short._comment_cap_post_holdout: Brief-default universe restored 2026-05-06 after holdout validation. Cell-level restrictions to mid_cap-only (commit f3d92fc) FAILED holdout — only 1 of 5 OOS-passing cells survived (just hour=morning, the broadest). The cap=mid_cap restriction starved holdout to n=23 (failed n>=50). Aggregate setup PF stable across all 3 windows (Disc 1.49, OOS 1.40, Holdout 1.46) so brief's pre-registered universe (mid+small) is the right ship state. See docs/edge_discovery/2026-05-06-sub9-holdout-gate/.
circuit_t1_fade_short._comment_regime_post_holdout: Brief had no regime restriction. Tried trend_up-only post-OOS but holdout invalidated it (regime=trend_up cell PF rose to 1.90 but WR delta +13.6pp triggered failure). Reverted to no regime restriction.
circuit_t1_fade_short._research_notes: Sub-project #9 first APPROVED setup. Asymmetry: post-circuit-hit retail FOMO + operator pump exhaustion in T+0 close, faded T+1 mid-session. Indian-microstructure-specific (NSE DPR flexing, no US/forex analog). Direction: short-only. 5 peer-reviewed sources (Guo JIFM 2023, Chen/Petukhov/Wang MIT WP, Tandfonline 2024, Sehgal PBFJ 2024, Chari 2017). Sanity check (tools/sub9_research/sanity_circuit_t1_fade_short.py): NET PF=1.473 on 654 trades over 2024. Brief: specs/2026-05-01-sub-project-9-brief-circuit_t1_fade_short.md.

delivery_pct_anomaly_short._comment_depends_on: Mechanism = fade post-pump speculator inventory unwind. CRITICAL dependency on F&O single-stock position math (MWPL). SEBI Oct 1, 2025 rules broke this (PF 1.245 OOS → 0.879 Holdout). Apr-1-2026 STT hike adds further fee pressure. Re-validate on every MWPL/position-limit change.
delivery_pct_anomaly_short._status_2026_05_14_paper_cell_B: PAPER ONLY. Production-replay analysis (analytics.jsonl fee model) on Jan-Sep 2025 OCI showed Cell B (mid_cap × 09:30-10:30) PF=1.245 n=295. Holdout (Oct'25-Apr'26) PF=0.879 — SEBI Oct 1, 2025 F&O rule changes (tightened MWPL, single-stock position limits) broke the speculator-inventory-unwind mechanism this setup fades. Pre-SEBI edge real; post-SEBI edge degraded. Shipping narrow Cell B at paper to capture forward data; re-evaluate live/retire after 30 days of paper.
delivery_pct_anomaly_short._status_2026_05_08_enabled: ENABLED for OCI smoke + Phase-1 backtest. Sub9 sanity Discovery PF 1.44 + OOS 1.90 + Holdout 1.13 + War-period 5.03 at tight targets. Push to OCI for trade capture in wide_open mode.
delivery_pct_anomaly_short._status_2026_05_08: NEW — sub9 sanity passed Discovery PF=1.44 + OOS PF=1.90 + Holdout PF=1.13 + War-period PF=5.03 at TIGHT targets (0.25R/0.75R/TS=1300). Phase-1 validation pending.
delivery_pct_anomaly_short._comment_allowed_cap_segments: Cell B narrow: mid_cap only. Production-replay 9-month OOS PF=1.245 on mid_cap (vs 0.83 large_cap, 0.76 small_cap). Adding caps dilutes edge.
delivery_pct_anomaly_short._comment_active_window: Cell B: 09:30-10:30 entry window. Was 09:30-10:00 (tighter); cell-mining validated 10:30 cutoff with mid_cap × this hour as the strongest surface point.
delivery_pct_anomaly_short._research_notes: Validated cell from delivery_pct anomaly cell-mining. SHORT only. Indian-microstructure anchor: NSE-published delivery percentage <20% + same-day pump >3% = retail/operator pump signature. Cross-day RVOL confirmation rejects intra-session false signals. Sanity: tools/sub9_research/sanity_nse_delivery_pct_anomaly.py. Brief: specs/2026-05-08-sub-project-9-brief-nse_delivery_pct_anomaly.md.

_comment_sl_atr_mult: REVERTED from 2.0 to 1.6 - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses instead of 600-700 Rs max
_comment_exit_sl_atr_mult_min: ATR SL adjustment disabled (0 = off). When >0, widens SL to at least N*ATR from entry. Was hardcoded to 1.0.
_comment_t1: Reverted to 60-40. 80-20 lost Rs.28K in 3yr backtest cross-reference (hurt range_bounce/resistance_bounce).
_comment_t2: 60-40 split allows T2 runners to capture more profit on winning trades.
_comment_be_buffer: Buffer above/below breakeven for SL after T1 (0.1% = 10 bps)
_comment_trail_time: PHASE 3: Tighten trail after 2:30 PM when NSE liquidity drops
_comment_t1_min_r: Skip T1 partial if profit < 0.3R â€” charges eat 87%+ of gross at <0.3R on NSE
_comment_or_kill: OR kill exit: DISABLED â€” not in working run. Keys kept for code compatibility.
_comment_entry_cutoff: Blocks entries with minute_of_day >= cutoff. With 15:10 cutoff: entries at 15:05 PASS (md=905<910), entries at 15:10 BLOCKED (md=910). Per-setup active_window_end is the primary defense against late signals (e.g., C-03/C-08 use 15:00 to prevent signal->entry->time_stop spanning <1 bar). Keep global at 15:10 so 15:00 signals can still enter at 15:05.
_comment_last_scan: Last scan slot to fire. Scans after this time are skipped to guarantee exit path (scale-out + EOD squareoff) has clean bandwidth. Must be >= entry_cutoff_hhmm and <= eod_squareoff_hhmm.
_comment_eod: PHASE 3: Extended from 15:12 to 15:15 to capture 3 extra minutes (safe before 15:20 circuit breaker)
_comment_max_positions: DIAGNOSTIC: Disabled limit (999) to see true setup performance without portfolio competition
_comment_wide_open: MASTER FLAG: when true, all historical-PnL filters are bypassed so raw detector edge can be measured on a 3-year backtest. Disables: trade_quality_gates (hour 10 block + category floors), _check_validated_combinations (VC whitelist), ICT sweep/MSS prerequisite in order_block detector, _validate_htf_trend hard-coded calls in BOS/CHoCH/FVG, _validate_premium_discount_zone calls, event_policy_gate session/expiry policy, news_spike_gate size penalties, directional_bias multipliers (neutralized to 1.0), dedupe cooloff, blocked_regimes/caps/entirely in all pipeline configs. PRESERVED: risk math, exit logic (T1/T2/SL/trailing/EOD), MIS eligibility, timing infrastructure, detector firing conditions themselves. Set to false for normal production operation.

quality_filters._comment_momentum_quality: INSTITUTIONAL FIX (exit-opt-004-phase2c): Momentum-based quality metric for breakouts. Replaces distance-based structural R:R with volume*breakout_strength/risk. Root cause analysis revealed distance-based R:R is inversely correlated with breakout quality - strong breakouts enter above ORH and had LOW structural R:R. Momentum quality measures what actually matters: volume confirmation + breakout strength + risk efficiency.

time_windows._comment_morning_start: OPENING BELL FIX: Changed from 09:25 to 09:15 - allow entries from market open to catch fresh moves (premium_zone T1 hits at 09:15-09:30)

opening_bell_override._comment: OPENING BELL DETECTION - Professional NSE Strategy (Fix for premium_zone_short late entries)
opening_bell_override._rationale: Evidence: 82% of premium_zone_short trades had T1 hit at 09:15-09:30, but entries at 11:00-14:00 (2-3 hrs late). Scanner now runs early (09:20-09:30) ONLY for ICT setups to catch first 2 candles. Other setups still wait until 09:30+ (normal 3-bar requirement).
opening_bell_override._window_comment: 10-minute opening window (09:20-09:30) for ICT setups ONLY - scanner runs with 1 bar minimum to catch first candle (09:15-09:20) like pro traders. Bypasses momentum/range filters, requires 2.0x volume. Other setups blocked until 09:30.
opening_bell_override._momentum_bypass_rationale: Opening session has high momentum (gap moves) - this is DESIRED, not noise. Momentum filter blocks best entries.
opening_bell_override._range_compression_bypass_rationale: Opening session has high ATR (expansion from gap) - this is NORMAL. Range compression filter blocks opening moves.
opening_bell_override._volume_comment: 2.0x volume = institutional participation (same as ICT standard). Ensures quality opening moves, not retail noise.
opening_bell_override._allowed_setups_comment: Surviving sub7+sub8 setups after Phase 1 cleanup. gap_fade_short fires at 09:30 (only one active in 09:15-09:30 window today). orb_15, pdh_pdl_reject, and pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim listed for forward-compat — their detectors gate themselves on min_bars_required and active_window.

quality_filters._comment_vwap_threshold: TIGHTENED: 1.5% from VWAP (was 2.0%) - only early-stage moves, not chasing tops
quality_filters._comment_volume_threshold: TIGHTENED: 2.0x volume (was 1.5x) - require stronger institutional participation

exits._comment_orb_failed_breakout: Buffer as fraction of OR range before triggering failed breakout exit. 0.3 = close must be 30% of OR range above ORL (for shorts) to trigger exit. Prevents normal pullback retests from killing trades.

risk._comment: mode=percentage uses capital*percentage, mode=fixed uses fixed_amount in Rs.

capital_management._comment_sizing: min_notional=4% min position, capital_util=85% safety buffer, max_alloc=20% max per trade

mis_leverage._comment: MIS leverage data is read from nse_all.json (mis_leverage field). This just enables/disables the feature.

planner_precision._comment: Option B: Increase measured move caps to 2x and 3x to allow configured 1.5R and 3.0R targets while maintaining structure-based safety

market_data_bus._comment_mode: standalone=local only (default), subscriber=receive from Market Data Service. Use --shared-market-data flag to enable subscriber mode.
market_data_bus._comment_ltp_mode: standalone=local cache, subscriber=read from Redis. Follows 'mode' setting.

daily_cache_redis._comment: Share daily OHLCV cache via Redis. MDS pre-warms (rolling cache from yesterday) and stores; subscribers load from Redis (~1-3s vs ~17min API). Set enabled:true when using multi-instance with Redis.

market_data_bus._comment_mds_eod: MDS builds daily bars from 1m data (9:15-15:30) and shuts down at this time (IST). 2 min buffer after market close to finalize last bar.
market_data_bus._comment_orb_trigger: 5m bar start-timestamp that triggers ORB level computation. Bar 0935 covers [09:35-09:40) and fires at ~09:40 wall time, after opening range (0915-0930) is complete.

tick_recording._comment: Records ticks to data/sidecar/ticks/ for backtesting. Can also run standalone: python -m market_data.tick_recorder

directional_bias._comment: V4: Data-optimized. 3yr grid search shows against-trend trades are net profitable (avg +Rs.197). Edge is in BOOSTING with-trend 1.2x, NOT blocking against. Exit modifiers neutralized (T1 split and trail changes tested negative). entry_threshold 0.2% for earlier direction detection.

_comment_backtest_mis: === BACKTEST MIS FILTERING (Reject non-MIS stocks in backtest to match live) ===

backtest_mis_filtering._comment: Filter non-MIS stocks in backtest using nse_all.json mis_enabled field. Large/mid cap MIS is 98.9% stable over 3 years. No capital restrictions applied â€” backtest tests signals/filters, not capital management.

_comment_early_mis_filter: === EARLY MIS UNIVERSE FILTER (Reduce live/paper universe to MIS-eligible stocks) ===

api_5m_bars._note: Fetch V3 intraday 5m bars for ALL core_symbols BEFORE Stage-0. Uses Historical API pipeline â€” guarantees backtest-live parity for both energy scoring and structure detection. Only active in live/paper mode (not backtest). 1500 symbols at 40 RPS = ~37s. Set fetch_all_symbols=false to revert to old behavior (fetch shortlisted only, after Stage-0).

early_mis_universe_filter._comment: Filter core_symbols to MIS-eligible stocks early in startup. Reduces ~2385 -> ~1500 symbols. Saves WS slots, prewarm time, Stage-0 compute. Uses ZerodhaMISFetcher (Google Sheets CSV). Required for Upstox hybrid mode (2000 instrument limit).

_comment_conviction_gate: === CONVICTION GATE (sub-project #2, retrained on sub7+sub8 OCI 2026-04-28) ===

conviction_gate._comment_retrain: Plan C model trained on all 281,795 sub7+sub8 trades from OCI 20260428-082149. Validation Pearson 0.11 (clipped) / 0.06 (raw). Plan A (Stage 3 cells only, n=7,310) collapsed to no signal â€” kept for reference at 2026-04-28-sub8-A-*.json.

dedup_gate._comment: Replaces ScreenerLive._dedupe_ok. Enforces same-symbol cooloff + setup-change + score-beats-max(pctl,last) rules. Legacy keys dedupe_cooloff_bars / dedupe_require_setup_change in filters config will be removed in T14.

gate_input_logging._comment: When true, screener_live writes per-bar candidate dicts + bar_volumes to gate_input.jsonl. Required for parity_simulator. Disable in production trading.

live_gate_chain._comment: Master switch for the composed gate stack. When false, ScreenerLive instantiates the chain in passthrough mode.

rule_filter_gate._comment_retrain: Plan C admit-all-per-setup survivors (8 tautology rules) â€” RuleFilterGate passes every sub7+sub8 candidate through to ConvictionGate, which is the actual discriminator. For Stage 3 cell enforcement, swap to stage6_validation_survivors_A_stage3_cells.json (14 rules).
